document_summary: China Daily report on the 13th Tiger Roar Awards ceremony. Provides media coverage of the awards event, including statistics on the judging process (650+ primary jury members, 90+ final judges, 3,500 entries) and the prestige of the awards. Liu is not mentioned by name; this is third-party media coverage corroborating the scale of the awards where Liu served as Deputy Director.

snippets.text: The Tiger Roar Awards, a recognized and forward- thinking accolade in the field of digital business communication, emphasize the comprehensive process utilized by enterprises (brand owners). This process includes the use of data, media, and various technical tools to execute digital marketing communication strategies. Furthermore, the award celebrates the latest, most innovative creative works in the realm of brand marketing digitalization.
snippets.subject: Tiger Roar Awards
snippets.reasoning: Establishes the Tiger Roar Awards as a recognized accolade in digital business communication, supporting the prestige of the judging event.

snippets.text: This year's Tiger Roar Awards, carrying the theme "Starting a New Journey," attracted a wide array of attendees, including sociologists, business scholars, marketing experts, and well- known brand owners. Liping Sun and Bofan Wu were among the esteemed judges.
snippets.subject: Tiger Roar Awards
snippets.reasoning: Names Liping Sun (Tsinghua professor from C6) and Bofan Wu as esteemed judges, showing caliber of peer judges alongside Liu.

snippets.text: It has been reported that this year's awards were judged online by over 650 primary jury members. Additionally, more than 90 final judges collectively reviewed the finalists, selecting the best from a pool of 3,500 entries — a rigorous process indeed. The accolades awarded to Balloon are a testament to the industry's recognition of the company's deep understanding of the new generation and its innovative strength in content marketing. This success also underscores the power of combining social media with high- quality content, which can unleash remarkable marketing potential in the era of social media.
snippets.subject: Tiger Roar Awards
snippets.reasoning: Key statistics: 650+ primary jury, 90+ final judges, 3,500 entries. Corroborates the scale and selectivity of the judging process Liu participated in.

snippets.text: On August 19th, the 13th Tiger Roar Awards ceremony, sponsored by the China Advertising Association of Commerce, concluded successfully in Beijing. Balloon, which submitted numerous case studies, secured several awards, including the Bronze Prize for KOL Marketing, and Excellence Awards in Entertainment, Leisure & Sports, Home Appliances, and IP categories.
snippets.subject: Tiger Roar Awards
snippets.reasoning: Confirms the 13th Tiger Roar Awards ceremony took place in Beijing, sponsored by China Advertising Association of Commerce.

snippets.text: Since its launch in 1981, China Daily has grown to become the nation's leading English- language newspaper. With a combined print, online and mobile readership of more than 350 million, it serves a vital role in telling the world about China, providing valuable insight into the world's second- largest economy. Consequently, it is quoted more often by overseas media than any other Chinese publication.
snippets.subject: China Daily
snippets.reasoning: Establishes China Daily as the nation's leading English-language newspaper with 350M+ readership, lending credibility to its coverage of the Tiger Roar Awards.

snippets.subject: China Daily
snippets.reasoning: Identifies the source as China Daily's website, a major national media outlet covering the Tiger Roar Awards.
